HEADER
ALAA ARBOUN
+(216) 44241715 ♦ Ariana
arbounala@gmail.com ♦ LinkedIn ♦ GitHub
OBJECTIVE
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
ACADEMIC PROJECTS
SKILLS
LANGUAGES
Machine LearningClassification, Regression, Clustering, Anomaly Detection, Recommendation Systems
Deep LearningCNN, RNN, LSTM, GRU, GANs,Transformers,YOLO
Computer VisionObject Detection, Object Tracking, Image and Video Processing, OpenCV, TensorRT
TECHNICAL SKILLS
VisualizationMatplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly, Tableau, Power BI
Data ScientistJuly 2022 - Sept 2022
Caustaza Group LTDTunis
EXPERIENCE
Computer Vision EngineerJan 2024 - Present
InveepTunis
Project 1: Automated Fabric Defect Detection System
Developed an automated fabric defect detection system using YOLOv8, achieving 92% accuracy in identifying multiple stain types in industrial textiles.
Created and annotated comprehensive dataset of fabric defects, implementing data augmentation techniques to improve model robustness.
Optimized model performance through 8-bit quantization, reducing model size by 75% and inference time by 40% for edge device deployment.
Implemented end-to-end pipeline from data collection to model deployment, enabling real-time defect detection in production environment.
Project 2: Intelligent Video Processing and Analysis System
Engineered an intelligent video processing system that automatically extracts and analyzes lengthy surveillance recordings from multiple hard drives.
Implemented YOLOv8 object detection pipeline reducing 10+ hour videos to 1-hour highlight reels containing only relevant object interactions.
Integrated ByteTracker algorithm for object tracking, enabling zone-based analytics with temporal metrics, achieving 95% tracking accuracy.
REQUIREMENTS
Project 3: Scalable AI Surveillance System
Engineered a scalable surveillance solution to monitor multiple environments by processing numerous simulta-neous camera streams.
Deployed advanced object detection and tracking algorithms to intelligently identify, record, and issue alerts for critical events.
Developed a user-friendly web dashboard for real-time monitoring, system configuration, and secure access to live feeds and recordings.
Implemented automated storage management that systematically purges outdated footage .
Data ScientistFeb 2023 - Sept 2023
Estif´edaTunis
EDUCATION
Enhanced GPT-2 model performance through fine-tuning, resulting in improved child-friendly vocabulary and storytelling guidance.
Designed interactive storytelling features enabling children to develop characters, build plots, and structure narratives with AI guidance.
2020 - 2023
Preparatory cycle of engineering, FSS University
2017 - 2020
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Developed RESTful API using Django for backend operations and NextJS for responsive frontend, handling 1000+ concurrent users with 99.9% uptime.
Integrated automated email campaign system, achieving 25% higher response rates compared to manual out-reach.
PROJECTS
COVID-19 Mask Detection System (EfficientDet, YOLO-v4, OpenCV) Engineered a dual-model mask detection system combining EfficientDet and YOLO-v4, achieving 94% detection accuracy at 25 FPS.
Implemented real-time analytics pipeline processing video feeds from multiple cameras, calculating masked vs.
unmasked percent-ages with 98% uptime.
Optimized model inference through TensorRT acceleration, reducing latency by 40% while maintaining accuracy.
Deployed solution across 15+ business locations, enabling automated COVID-19 compliance monitoring and reducing manual oversight by 75%.
Fraud Detection in Energy Consumption (Random Forest, XGBoost, Streamlit) Engineered an end-to-end fraud detection system processing 1M+ daily transactions with 92% accuracy using ensemble methods.
Reduced false positives by 40% through feature engineering and custom anomaly detection algorithms.
Deployed interactive dashboard using Streamlit, enabling real-time monitoring of suspicious activities across 100K+ customers.
E-commerce Recommendation System (LSTM, GRU) Designed and implemented a hybrid recommendation engine processing user behavior data from 1M+ transactions.
Achieved 35% improvement in click-through rate using ensemble of LSTM and GRU models for sequence prediction.
Reduced recommendation latency by 60% through model optimization and caching strategies.
Increased average order value by 25% through personalized product recommendations.

## ALAA ARBOUN

+(216) 44241715 ♦ Ariana
arbounala@gmail.com ♦ LinkedIn ♦ GitHub

## LANGUAGES

Machine LearningClassification, Regression, Clustering, Anomaly Detection, Recommendation Systems
Deep LearningCNN, RNN, LSTM, GRU, GANs,Transformers,YOLO
Computer VisionObject Detection, Object Tracking, Image and Video Processing, OpenCV, TensorRT

## TECHNICAL SKILLS

VisualizationMatplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly, Tableau, Power BI
Data ScientistJuly 2022 - Sept 2022
Caustaza Group LTDTunis

## EXPERIENCE

Computer Vision EngineerJan 2024 - Present
InveepTunis
Project 1: Automated Fabric Defect Detection System
Developed an automated fabric defect detection system using YOLOv8, achieving 92% accuracy in identifying multiple stain types in industrial textiles.
Created and annotated comprehensive dataset of fabric defects, implementing data augmentation techniques to improve model robustness.
Optimized model performance through 8-bit quantization, reducing model size by 75% and inference time by 40% for edge device deployment.
Implemented end-to-end pipeline from data collection to model deployment, enabling real-time defect detection in production environment.
Project 2: Intelligent Video Processing and Analysis System
Engineered an intelligent video processing system that automatically extracts and analyzes lengthy surveillance recordings from multiple hard drives.
Implemented YOLOv8 object detection pipeline reducing 10+ hour videos to 1-hour highlight reels containing only relevant object interactions.
Integrated ByteTracker algorithm for object tracking, enabling zone-based analytics with temporal metrics, achieving 95% tracking accuracy.

## REQUIREMENTS

Project 3: Scalable AI Surveillance System
Engineered a scalable surveillance solution to monitor multiple environments by processing numerous simulta-neous camera streams.
Deployed advanced object detection and tracking algorithms to intelligently identify, record, and issue alerts for critical events.
Developed a user-friendly web dashboard for real-time monitoring, system configuration, and secure access to live feeds and recordings.
Implemented automated storage management that systematically purges outdated footage .
Data ScientistFeb 2023 - Sept 2023
Estif´edaTunis

## EDUCATION

Enhanced GPT-2 model performance through fine-tuning, resulting in improved child-friendly vocabulary and storytelling guidance.
Designed interactive storytelling features enabling children to develop characters, build plots, and structure narratives with AI guidance.
2020 - 2023
Preparatory cycle of engineering, FSS University
2017 - 2020

## PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Developed RESTful API using Django for backend operations and NextJS for responsive frontend, handling 1000+ concurrent users with 99.9% uptime.
Integrated automated email campaign system, achieving 25% higher response rates compared to manual out-reach.

## PROJECTS

COVID-19 Mask Detection System (EfficientDet, YOLO-v4, OpenCV) Engineered a dual-model mask detection system combining EfficientDet and YOLO-v4, achieving 94% detection accuracy at 25 FPS.
Implemented real-time analytics pipeline processing video feeds from multiple cameras, calculating masked vs.
unmasked percent-ages with 98% uptime.
Optimized model inference through TensorRT acceleration, reducing latency by 40% while maintaining accuracy.
Deployed solution across 15+ business locations, enabling automated COVID-19 compliance monitoring and reducing manual oversight by 75%.
Fraud Detection in Energy Consumption (Random Forest, XGBoost, Streamlit) Engineered an end-to-end fraud detection system processing 1M+ daily transactions with 92% accuracy using ensemble methods.
Reduced false positives by 40% through feature engineering and custom anomaly detection algorithms.
Deployed interactive dashboard using Streamlit, enabling real-time monitoring of suspicious activities across 100K+ customers.
E-commerce Recommendation System (LSTM, GRU) Designed and implemented a hybrid recommendation engine processing user behavior data from 1M+ transactions.
Achieved 35% improvement in click-through rate using ensemble of LSTM and GRU models for sequence prediction.
Reduced recommendation latency by 60% through model optimization and caching strategies.
Increased average order value by 25% through personalized product recommendations.
